notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q MD&A part 1/2 (accession 0001546417-24-000160, 2024-11-08); no fiscal_kpis in this chunk.
Brand-level comp drivers (Outback, Carrabba's, Bonefish, Fleming's, Outback Brazil) coined separately from company-wide same_store_sales per ontology R9 brand-metric rule.
Source phrase 'comparable restaurant sales' rendered as standard whole phrase same_store_sales per R6.

Skipped 15 considered items: pre_opening_expense and executive_transition_costs (banned state words 'opening'/'transition'), severance_costs and technology_projects (bundled into impairment/closures and restaurant_development), gift_card_breakage and franchise_royalties (definitional, not causal), diluted_eps and total_revenue (no consensus comparison so no _surprise form; bare metric), and risk-factor boilerplate too generic to ground: weather, cybersecurity, competition, food safety, credit availability, leverage/covenants, goodwill impairment (dup of asset_impairment_charges).
fiscal_calendar_shift and restaurant_closures kept as reusable event-class nouns (per R10 government_shutdown/goodwill_impairment precedent); flag for G2 if judged state-words.
